content.content:
# Rosé Pine for Zellij

## Overview
This is a theme repository for Zellij, a terminal multiplexer. The theme brings the Rosé Pine color palette to Zellij with "all natural pine, faux fur and a bit of soho vibes for the classy minimalist."

## Repository Contents
- `dist/` directory (compiled theme files)
- `template.kdl` (source template using Rosé Pine variables)
- `README.md` (documentation)
- `LICENSE` (MIT license)

## Installation Options

### Option 1: Direct Config Integration
Copy the contents of the theme files (`rose-pine.kdl`, `rose-pine-dawn.kdl`, or `rose-pine-moon.kdl`) directly into your Zellij configuration file at `~/.config/zellij/config.kdl`, then add:
```
theme "rose-pine" // or "rose-pine-moon" or "rose-pine-dawn"
```

### Option 2: Themes Folder
Move the theme files to `~/.config/zellij/themes/`, then reference them in your config as shown above.

## Available Variants
- `rose-pine` (main variant)
- `rose-pine-moon`
- `rose-pine-dawn`

## Development
To modify the theme, edit `template.kdl` using Rosé Pine color variables, then build variants using:
```
npx @rose-pine/build@latest -t template.kdl -f rgb-ns
```

## Credits
Created with contribution from anihm136. Licensed under MIT.

content.content:
# Rose Pine Theme Configuration

This KDL theme file defines the "rose-pine" color scheme with the following component styles:

**Core UI Elements:**
- Text states (selected/unselected)
- Ribbon states (selected/unselected)
- Table styling (titles and cells)
- List items (selected/unselected)
- Frame styling with highlight states

**Status Indicators:**
- Success exit code styling
- Error exit code styling

**Multiplayer Support:**
The theme includes distinct colors for up to 6 active players, with placeholder entries for players 7-10.

**Color Palette:**
The scheme uses a coordinated set of RGB values including purples (196 167 231), teals (49 116 143), rose tones (235 188 186), and accent colors like gold (246 193 119) and coral (235 111 146), applied consistently across UI elements with variations for selected/unselected and background states.

# Rose Pine Dawn Theme Configuration

This KDL theme file defines the "rose-pine-dawn" color scheme with RGB values for various UI components:

**Core Color Palette:**
- Primary text: `87 82 121` (muted purple)
- Light background: `244 237 232` (cream)
- Accent colors ranging from coral (`215 130 126`) to teal (`40 105 131`)

**Component Styling:**
The theme specifies colors for text states (selected/unselected), ribbons, tables, lists, and frames. Selected elements use a slightly darker background (`223 218 217`), while unselected elements use the lighter cream.

**Special Elements:**
- Success indicators use teal (`40 105 131`)
- Error states use rose (`180 99 122`)
- Multiplayer player colors include the primary palette across 6 defined players (players 7-10 are black/undefined)

The theme maintains consistent emphasis color hierarchy across all components, with emphasis_0 through emphasis_3 providing visual distinction for nested information.

# Rose Pine Moon Theme Configuration

This KDL theme file defines the "rose-pine-moon" color scheme with the following component categories:

**Core Elements:**
- Text (selected/unselected states) with base color `224 222 244` and background `42 40 62`
- Ribbon elements (selected/unselected) using contrasting backgrounds
- Table components (title, selected cells, unselected cells)
- List items (selected/unselected states)
- Frame styling (selected and highlight states)

**Status Indicators:**
- Exit code success: `62 143 176` (blue-toned)
- Exit code error: `235 111 146` (red-toned)

**Multiplayer Colors:**
Six active player colors defined (players 1-6), with players 7-10 set to black `0 0 0`.

**Color Palette:**
The theme employs muted, cool-toned colors typical of the Rose Pine aesthetic, with emphasis colors across four levels for visual hierarchy and accent purposes.

# KDL Theme Configuration File

This is a KDL (KDL Document Language) configuration file defining a theme system with color variables and styling rules.

## Structure Overview

The file contains a `themes` block with an `$id` identifier that defines styling for various UI elements:

**Text Elements:**
- `text_unselected` and `text_selected` - base text styling with highlight backgrounds and color emphasis levels
- `list_unselected` and `list_selected` - list item styling

**Interactive Components:**
- `ribbon_selected`/`ribbon_unselected` - ribbon UI styling
- `table_title`, `table_cell_selected`, `table_cell_unselected` - table styling
- `frame_selected` and `frame_highlight` - frame borders and highlights

**Status Indicators:**
- `exit_code_success` - green/pine success coloring
- `exit_code_error` - red/love error coloring

**Multiplayer Features:**
- `multiplayer_user_colors` - assigns distinct colors (iris, pine, rose, gold, foam, love) to up to 6 players, with 4 additional empty slots

Each element uses variable references (like `$text`, `$rose`, `$pine`) with `base` and `background` properties, plus emphasis levels 0-3 for color layering. Some elements use `0 0 0` for black/transparent values.

input.description: Fetch raw content of template.kdl via GitHub API

content.content:
themes {
  $id {
    text_unselected {
      base $text
      background $highlightLow
      emphasis_0 $rose
      emphasis_1 $foam
      emphasis_2 $pine
      emphasis_3 $iris
    }
    text_selected {
      base $text
      background $highlightMed
      emphasis_0 $rose
      emphasis_1 $foam
      emphasis_2 $pine
      emphasis_3 $iris
    }
    ribbon_selected {
      base $highlightLow
      background $pine
      emphasis_0 $gold
      emphasis_1 $rose
      emphasis_2 $iris
      emphasis_3 $foam
    }
    ribbon_unselected {
      base $base
      background $text
      emphasis_0 $gold
      emphasis_1 $rose
      emphasis_2 $iris
      emphasis_3 $foam
    }
    table_title {
      base $pine
      background 0 0 0
      emphasis_0 $rose
      emphasis_1 $foam
      emphasis_2 $pine
      emphasis_3 $iris
    }
    table_cell_selected {
      base $text
      background $highlightMed
      emphasis_0 $rose
      emphasis_1 $foam
      emphasis_2 $pine
      emphasis_3 $iris
    }
    table_cell_unselected {
      base $text
      background $highlightLow
      emphasis_0 $rose
      emphasis_1 $foam
      emphasis_2 $pine
      emphasis_3 $iris
    }
    list_selected {
      base $text
      background $highlightMed
      emphasis_0 $rose
      emphasis_1 $foam
      emphasis_2 $pine
      emphasis_3 $iris
    }
    list_unselected {
      base $text
      background $highlightLow
      emphasis_0 $rose
      emphasis_1 $foam
      emphasis_2 $pine
      emphasis_3 $iris
    }
    frame_selected {
      base $pine
      background 0 0 0
      emphasis_0 $rose
      emphasis_1 $foam
      emphasis_2 $iris
      emphasis_3 0 0 0
    }
    frame_highlight {
      base $rose
      background 0 0 0
      emphasis_0 $rose
      emphasis_1 $rose
      emphasis_2 $rose
      emphasis_3 $rose
    }
    exit_code_success {
      base $pine
      background 0 0 0
      emphasis_0 $foam
      emphasis_1 $highlightLow
      emphasis_2 $iris
      emphasis_3 $pine
    }
    exit_code_error {
      base $love
      background 0 0 0
      emphasis_0 $gold
      emphasis_1 0 0 0
      emphasis_2 0 0 0
      emphasis_3 0 0 0
    }
    multiplayer_user_colors {
      player_1 $iris
      player_2 $pine
      player_3 $rose
      player_4 $gold
      player_5 $foam
      player_6 $love
      player_7 0 0 0
      player_8 0 0 0
      player_9 0 0 0
      player_10 0 0 0
    }
  }
}

content.text:
Here is the full raw content of all four files from `https://github.com/rose-pine/zellij`. The theme files live under `dist/`, not at the repo root.

---

## `dist/rose-pine.kdl`

```kdl
themes {
  rose-pine {
    text_unselected {
      base 224 222 244
      background 33 32 46
      emphasis_0 235 188 186
      emphasis_1 156 207 216
      emphasis_2 49 116 143
      emphasis_3 196 167 231
    }
    text_selected {
      base 224 222 244
      background 64 61 82
      emphasis_0 235 188 186

      emphasis_1 235 188 186
      emphasis_2 196 167 231
      emphasis_3 156 207 216
    }
    table_title {
      base 49 116 143

      emphasis_0 235 188 186

      emphasis_3 196 167 231
    }

    }
    list_selected {

    }
    list_unselected {

    }
    frame_selected {

    }
    frame_highlight {
      base 235 188 186
```

## `template.kdl` (source template with variable names)

```kdl
themes {
  $id {
    text_unselected {
      base $text
      background $highlightLow
      emphasis_0 $rose
      emphasis_1 $foam
      emphasis_2 $pine
      emphasis_3 $iris
    }
    text_selected {
      base $text
      background $highlightMed
      ...
    }
    ribbon_selected {
      base $highlightLow
      background $pine
      emphasis_0 $gold
      emphasis_1 $rose
      emphasis_2 $iris
      emphasis_3 $foam
    }
    ribbon_unselected {
      base $base
      background $text
      ...
    }
    ...
    exit_code_success { base $pine ... }
    exit_code_error { base $love ... }
    multiplayer_user_colors {
      player_1 $iris
      player_2 $pine
      player_3 $rose
      player_4 $gold
      player_5 $foam
      player_6 $love
      player_7–10 0 0 0
    }
  }
}
```

---

**Key notes:**

- The files are at `dist/` in the repo, not at the root. The correct raw URLs are:
  - `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rose-pine/zellij/main/dist/rose-pine.kdl`
  - `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rose-pine/zellij/main/dist/rose-pine-moon.kdl`
  - `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rose-pine/zellij/main/dist/rose-pine-dawn.kdl`
- Installation: copy a theme file's contents into `~/.config/zellij/config.kdl` and add `theme "rose-pine"` (or the variant name), or place the files in `~/.config/zellij/themes/`.
- The template is built with `npx @rose-pine/build@latest -t template.kdl -f rgb-ns`.

```kdl
themes {

    ribbon_selected {
```

```kdl
      background $pine
      emphasis_0 $gold
      emphasis_1 $rose
      emphasis_2 $iris
      emphasis_3 $foam
    }
    ribbon_unselected {
      base $base
      background $text
      ...
    }
    ...
    exit_code_success { base $pine ... }
    exit_code_error { base $love ... }

      player_2 $pine
      player_3 $rose
```

- The files are at `dist/` in the repo, not at the root. The correct raw URLs are:
  - `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rose-pine/zellij/main/dist/rose-pine.kdl`
  - `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rose-pine/zellij/main/dist/rose-pine-moon.kdl`
  - `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rose-pine/zellij/main/dist/rose-pine-dawn.kdl`
- Installation: copy a theme file's contents into `~/.config/zellij/config.kdl` and add `theme "rose-pine"` (or the variant name), or place the files in `~/.config/zellij/themes/`.
- The template is built with `npx @rose-pine/build@latest -t template.kdl -f rgb-ns`.

Which variant do you want?
- `rose-pine` — dark (main)
- `rose-pine-moon` — dark, warmer midtones
- `rose-pine-dawn` — light
